---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for VoloGen
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the ideal outcome. If you have ideas about the API surface, include code samples:

```csharp
// Example of how the feature might be used
[AutoParsable(SomeNewOption = true)]
public partial struct MyType { }
```

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other approaches you've considered?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
